# customizer

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Registers the tab-bar variant picker (chip / underline / connected) into the theme customizer.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `ThemeEngine.VariantGroup` "Tab bar" → `VariantPicker`
  - Uses: `config_v2.useConfig`, `config_v2.useSetConfig`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `ui/tab-bar.TabBarSlots`, `ui/theme-engine.ThemeEngine`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
